claim_text: STAT1 knockdown suppresses interferon signaling in stimulated CD4+ T cells.
supported_parts: STAT1 CRISPRi knockdown significantly reduces interferon signaling pathway activity (240 DE genes, on-target effect -6.8, FDR-significant, 4/4 guide robustness).
safer_rewrite: STAT1 knockdown is associated with a significant reduction in interferon signaling pathway activity in Stim8hr CD4+ T cells.

claim_text: IRF4 perturbation acts as a master regulator of Th2 polarization.
supported_parts: IRF4 knockdown shifts cells toward an altered Th2-like signature (GATA3, IL4, MAF downregulated; adjusted p = 0.002).
safer_rewrite: IRF4 perturbation is associated with a shifted Th2-like polarization signature; 'master regulator' status would require robustness and orthogonal validation beyond this single screen.

claim_text: BATF is a therapeutic target for reversing T cell exhaustion.
safer_rewrite: BATF perturbation shows an exhaustion-like signature shift, but with low guide/donor robustness (2 guides, low target expression flag) and no functional or translational evidence — 'therapeutic target' is not yet supported.

claim_text: NFKB1 knockdown suppresses inflammatory signaling in stimulated CD4+ T cells.
supported_parts: NFKB1 CRISPRi knockdown significantly reduces TNF/NF-κB pathway activity (adjusted p = 0.00005, 3/3 guide robustness).
safer_rewrite: NFKB1 knockdown is associated with reduced TNF/NF-κB inflammatory signaling activity in Stim8hr CD4+ T cells.
